title: Add a user statement to automation for notification
excerpt:

posts.author: GSCB (Cam B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
We want to be able to configure notifications to be sent out via automation to changes to items but not have these not be sent if a specific user makes the change. This way the owner of the board can be notified of changes made by anyone else. Currently they get notified of all changes even ones they’ve made themselves which leads to an avalanche of notifications when not necessary. For example:

Went status changes to anything send notification to user A if change made by not user A.

Thanks

posts.author: ebeers (Elizabeth B)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love this feature as well. Currently when I make changes to someone else’s item, like moving it to their group, I have to leave a comment on the item to flag it for them. It would be great to instead have an automation for it like this: “When person changes to user A, send notification to user A only if change made by not user A.”
